content: YAML parser implementation: greenhouse uses a custom minimal YAML parser (src/config.ts parseYaml) supporting nested objects, string arrays, object arrays, block scalars (|), booleans, numbers. Based on overstory pattern but extends with block scalar support for pr_template multiline strings.

JSONL state persistence: state.ts uses append-only JSONL with dedup-on-read, advisory file locking (exclusive create + 30s stale detection), and atomic temp-file-then-rename writes. Same pattern as seeds/mulch.
Daily budget derived from state: budget.ts counts RunState entries where dispatchedAt date matches today (YYYY-MM-DD prefix). No separate budget file; state.jsonl is the single source of truth.
